owner.name: Alain Rivera
owner.positioning: I help turn growing operations into structured, scalable systems through process design, performance visibility, and disciplined execution.
owner.summary: Operations and business transformation professional with experience across corporate performance, entrepreneurial execution, and multi-site operational scaling in Canada. My work connects process structure, systems implementation, KPI logic, and practical execution to improve visibility, control, and business performance.

projects.title: Multi-site Operations Transformation
projects.context: Growing hospitality operations with increasing volume, more service points, and the need for stronger execution control.
projects.problem: Daily operations depended too much on informal coordination, limited visibility, and fragmented systems.
actions: Expanded and structured operating capacity across locations.
Implemented POS, KDS, network, CCTV, and delivery platform workflows.
Built practical reporting logic for revenue, costs, service flow, and operational decisions.
projects.result: Supported revenue growth from approximately CAD $1.79M in 2023 to CAD $2.52M in 2025 while improving operational visibility and scalability.

projects.title: Business Performance & KPI Architecture
projects.context: Corporate performance environment involving planning, targets, incentives, reporting, and executive-facing analysis.
projects.problem: Performance conversations required clearer KPI structures, consistent measurement, and better visibility across business areas.
actions: Worked with AOPs, KPIs, incentive logic, and performance reporting structures.
Supported management visibility through structured analysis and reporting discipline.
Connected business activity, performance indicators, and decision-making needs.
projects.result: Built a strong foundation in business performance management, executive communication, and structured operational analysis.

projects.title: Retail Expansion & Import Operations
projects.context: Entrepreneurial business environment involving retail execution, sourcing, logistics, and expansion decisions.
projects.problem: The business needed reliable sourcing, import coordination, operating discipline, and scalable commercial execution.
actions: Coordinated product sourcing and supplier follow-up with partners in China.
Supported import processes from supplier selection through shipment and border clearance follow-up.
Managed operational execution across retail and commercial growth activities.
projects.result: Developed hands-on ownership across sourcing, logistics, retail operations, and business expansion under real operating pressure.

projects.title: Structured Digital Systems Thinking
projects.scope: NIXINX · Business systems and product thinking
projects.context: Independent work focused on translating business operations into structured digital workflows and scalable user experiences.
projects.problem: Many small and growing businesses lack simple systems to organize content, operations, customer interaction, and execution.
actions: Designed structured concepts for business-facing PWAs, workflow control, and operational interfaces.
Applied operations logic to digital systems, user flows, and scalable service delivery models.
Connected business needs with practical technology decisions without overcomplicating the user experience.
projects.result: Reinforced the bridge between operations transformation, product thinking, and practical digital execution.

timeline.text: Built experience in business performance, KPI structures, planning cycles, incentives, and executive-facing analysis.
Applied ownership in sourcing, imports, retail operations, logistics, and business expansion.
Led practical transformation through systems, reporting, process structure, and scalable execution across growing operations.
Extended the same operating mindset into structured digital workflows, PWA concepts, and business-facing systems.

capabilities.title: Operations Transformation
capabilities.text: Turning fragmented day-to-day execution into structured, repeatable, and scalable operating models.

capabilities.title: Systems Implementation
capabilities.text: Introducing practical tools and workflows that improve coordination, visibility, and control.

capabilities.title: Business Performance & KPIs
capabilities.text: Designing performance logic that connects activity, targets, incentives, and management decisions.

capabilities.title: Data & Decision Making
capabilities.text: Transforming operational information into useful dashboards, reports, and decision support.

capabilities.title: Multi-site Execution
capabilities.text: Coordinating growth across locations while maintaining consistency, responsiveness, and accountability.

aiRules: Answer only from this professional profile context.
Do not invent employers, dates, metrics, technologies, certifications, or responsibilities.
Keep answers concise, professional, and defensible in an interview.
If the context does not contain enough information, say that the profile does not provide enough detail.
